---
title: "Isabella Chan"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bellaisac
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/bellaisac
---

Hi! I am a second year marine science major and a statistics minor at California State University, Monterey Bay

## Education

California State University, Monterey Bay | Marina, CA  
B.S. in Marine Science, minor in Statistics| 2024-2028 

## Research

Bonnethead Shark Microbiome  
CSUMB Symbiosis, Ecology, and Analytics Lab | June 2025 - present

Optimization of the protocol for RNA isolation on scleractinian corals  
CSUMB UROC | June 2026 - August 2026

## Experience

CSUMB Mathematics and Statistics |  
Instructional Student Assistant |   
January 2025 - present
